negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_071c7452-afc7-4dd7-99af-ee9668572af7
prompt: A formally dressed man is captured entering a well-furnished hotel room. The man, dressed in a formal black suit, enters a modern, well-lit hotel room carrying two pieces of luggage – one in each hand. The scene begins with him walking through the entrance, pulling a black trolley bag in his right hand and rolling a checkered-patterned trolley bag with his left. The lighting is bright and natural, with sunlight streaming through expansive floor-to-ceiling windows draped with sheer white curtains, complemented by heavy brown curtains drawn to the sides, creating a warm, airy ambiance. A large bed positioned against the right wall features a cushioned headboard with floral accents, neatly covered with white sheets, and adorned with decorative pillows. A vibrant red runner is placed across the foot side of the bed. Beside the bed, a mirror-surfaced bedside table holds a contemporary table lamp emitting a soft, warm glow in the corner. On the opposite side of the bed, a dark wooden panel supports a large flat-screen television at eye level. Adjacent to the window area is a cozy seating area equipped with a deep blue cushioned chaise lounge chair offering a perfect spot for relaxation and behind it stands a tall floor lamp with a blue circular shade. To the left of the room, a black work desk is accompanied by an armchair along with essentials like a desk lamp and notepad, forming a functional workspace. The walls are designed with wooden patterns that add sophistication to the space.  The man first walks into the room and places his bags near the chaise lounge, adjusting their position by pressing down the railings on the trolley. He then walks towards the room’s entrance. The scene is captured in a full shot with a steady camera at eye level, starting with a right pan as the man enters the room, then transitioning to a left pan as he moves toward the entrance. An overlay image of a smiling woman in a white blouse, located in the top right corner of the frame, is consistently present throughout the video.
